suite.name: Demo1 Suite

kw.name: Connect To Database
kw.msg: Connect to DB using : pymysql.connect(db='sql8821965', user='sql8821965', passwd=***, host='sql8.freesqldatabase.com', port=3306, charset='utf8mb4')
OperationalError: (2003, "Can't connect to MySQL server on 'sql8.freesqldatabase.com' ([WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it)")
kw.doc: Creates a database connection using the DB API 2.0 ``db_module`` and the parameters provided. Along with listed commonly used arguments (`db_name`, `db_host` etc.) you can set any other DB module specific parameters as key/value pairs.
kw.status: OperationalError: (2003, "Can't connect to MySQL server on 'sql8.freesqldatabase.com' ([WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it)")

test.name: TC1
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: OperationalError: (2003, "Can't connect to MySQL server on 'sql8.freesqldatabase.com' ([WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it)")

kw.name: Disconnect From All Databases
kw.doc: Disconnects from all the databases - useful when testing with multiple database connections (aliases).

suite.status: Suite setup failed: OperationalError: (2003, "Can't connect to MySQL server on 'sql8.freesqldatabase.com' ([WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it)")
